title: Command Cockpit Bot Character Frame
summary: Turned the selected-lane owner bot portrait into a compact animated character socket so the cockpit feels more game-like without adding another scroll layer.
changes: Added a reusable agentCharacterFrame helper driven by existing bot callsign, specialty, accent, and sprite-sheet cell metadata.
Replaced the selected-lane HUD owner avatar with an animated character frame while leaving existing bot roster and party avatars compatible.
Added bounded aura, scan-line, and sigil styling with mobile cockpit containment so the character identity stays premium inside the same HUD footprint.
